journal_share_label: pipe connectivity: share of exam items answerable from a fresh journal entry — the number to drive to 1.0
informed_accuracy_caveat: consultant = grader; pinned at 1.0 by construction until monad #1 can disagree — the journal is educated by the SAME oracle that grades, so only staleness can lower it
share_weighted_label: journal_share x informed_accuracy — credit only for informed, correct answers over the WHOLE exam
note: GENERATIVE curriculum, HONEST-NULLS (2026-07-09): the old sha256(address:question:epoch)&1 coin-flip fallback for ignorant agents is DELETED — ungraded surfaces as ABSENCE, never as a fabricated 0.5-expectation guess. Every question is minted THIS round from a LIVE oracle run (RDAP+TLS+HTTP). Agents answer ONLY from their journal (educated by the oracle-journal bridge); knowledge older than 24h goes stale. Accuracy denominator = journal-informed answers only; unanswered items are a coverage gap, not a 0.5. Unreachable domains are skipped, never fabricated.
recompute: for each question: run onyx_oracle.r_merchant_multi(domain) at the same hour → band; answer = (claimed_band == band); verify sig (EIP-191 by attestor) over 'genq:{epoch}:{domain}:{claimed}:{band}:{answer}'; per-agent accuracy (informed answers only) appended to [internal ledger] (same format as bootcamp → delta_reward pays the climb unchanged).
